taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, IT Solutions Architect
core_skills: SQL, Python, Tableau, Cloud computing platforms, Data analysis
skill_match_scores: SQL:1.0, Python:1.0, Tableau:0.5, Cloud computing platforms:1.0, Data analysis:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Analytics, or a related field, 2-4 years in the field of programmatic media, digital marketing, or analytics, Knowledge of SQL, Python, Tableau, and cloud computing platforms, Experience with data analysis, data design, and technical storytelling, Experience working with clients and solving their media & analytics needs, Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, Experience in project management a plus, Great attention to detail, Ability to work as part of a team, Excellent critical thinking, verbal, and written communication skills
preferred_quals: A master's degree is a plus
core_responsibilities: Creating custom project proposals, automating and executing repeatable workflows, building dashboards and decks to deliver technical outputs in a client-friendly format, Accomplishing tasks on time and to a high quality, managing different deadlines and priorities, Collaborating with engineering and analytics teams to build solution development roadmap and deliver outputs, Staying focused and contributing to projects. Organizing stakeholders and multiple milestones, Providing technical assistance alongside other departments to develop existing solutions and find new solutions for MiQ clients, Proactively identifying and filling process and knowledge gaps to grow our capabilities as a team, Working with internal stakeholders, building relationships and working across differences to find solutions, Working with clients to understand current challenges and formulate problem statements to be further developed into custom solutions, Crisp and clear communication to external partners/clients or internal stakeholders; flexing communication style to persuade others and influence positive outcomes, Being the voice of the market, providing development ideas to Data Science and Product team to fuel product innovation
job_summary: MiQ is a global programmatic media partner for marketers and agencies, dedicated to leading the programmatic industry. As a Solutions Engineer, you will collaborate with various teams to scope client analytics opportunities and deliver tailored solutions, ensuring high-quality project execution and effective communication with stakeholders.
